title: Write a strong conclusion
subtitle: Return to the bigger meaning.
overview: Module: Writing Toward C1. C1 Bridge develops conceptual thinking, source synthesis, discourse control, long-form speaking, analytical writing, and independent C1 learning habits.

sections.title: C1 bridge focus
rows: A strong conclusion does more than repeat the thesis.
强结论不只是重复论点。
C1 Bridge frame: establish the position, develop the logic, integrate evidence, refine tone, and revise for coherence.
C1 Bridge 框架：确立立场、展开逻辑、整合证据、打磨语气，并为连贯性修改。
写一个强有力的结论句。
Ultimately, the question is not how much English a learner has seen, but how much of that English has become available for thought, conversation, and action.
最终，问题不是学习者看过多少英语，而是其中有多少英语已经可用于思考、对话和行动。

items.en: A strong conclusion does more than repeat the thesis.
items.zh: 强结论不只是重复论点。

items.en: C1 Bridge frame: establish the position, develop the logic, integrate evidence, refine tone, and revise for coherence.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 框架：确立立场、展开逻辑、整合证据、打磨语气，并为连贯性修改。

items.en: Ultimately, the question is not how much English a learner has seen, but how much of that English has become available for thought, conversation, and action.
items.zh: 最终，问题不是学习者看过多少英语，而是其中有多少英语已经可用于思考、对话和行动。

items.en: I will not hide behind advanced vocabulary; I will make the thinking clear.
items.zh: 我不会躲在高级词汇后面；我会把思考说清楚。

items.en: A C1 Bridge answer should show independence, coherence, nuance, and control.
items.zh: C1 Bridge 回答应该显示独立性、连贯性、细腻度和控制力。

items.en: If the idea is abstract, I will anchor it in one concrete case.
items.zh: 如果想法很抽象，我会把它锚定在一个具体案例中。

items.en: I can revise not only grammar, but also logic, density, tone, and voice.
items.zh: 我可以修改的不只是语法，也包括逻辑、密度、语气和声音。

items.en: This lesson becomes real when I can use the move in a new topic without copying the model.
items.zh: 当我能在新话题中使用这个动作，而不是复制示范时，这节课才变得真实。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 写一个强有力的结论句。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Ultimately, the question is not how much English a learner has seen, but how much of that English has become available for thought, conversation, and action.
lines.zh: 最终，问题不是学习者看过多少英语，而是其中有多少英语已经可用于思考、对话和行动。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you make the response more conceptual and still easy to follow?
lines.zh: 你能让回应更概念化，同时仍然容易跟上吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will define the idea, give one concrete case, and explain why it matters.
lines.zh: 可以。我会定义这个想法，给一个具体案例，并解释它为什么重要。

items.zh: 写一个强有力的结论句。

items.en: Answer once in eight to ten sentences with a clear line of thought.
items.zh: 用八到十句话回答一次，并保持清楚思路。

items.en: Add one C1 Bridge move: define a concept, synthesize sources, name an assumption, or state an unresolved question.
items.zh: 加入一个 C1 Bridge 动作：定义概念、综合来源、指出假设，或提出未解决问题。

items.en: Record the answer, then revise one part for logic and one part for style.
items.zh: 录下回答，然后修改一处逻辑和一处风格。

items.en: Keep the revised answer as a model for future C1 Core practice.
items.zh: 把修改后的回答作为未来 C1 Core 练习的模型。
